sweet_spot.description: Skip 6 lowest-importance layers during token generation; all layers run during prompt processing

sample_outputs.prompt: Write a SOAP note for a 45-year-old male with a 3-day history of headache and low-grade fever.
sample_outputs.no-skip:

    *   **Goal:** Create a realistic, medically plausible clinical note.
